name: io.github.meshtastic/meshtastic-mcp
description: Discover, drive, observe, and test Meshtastic devices and companion apps over serial and TCP.

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_FIRMWARE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Meshtastic firmware checkout. Optional — enables the firmware capability (build/flash/boards/userprefs). Core device/admin/recorder tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_MCP_TCP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: host[:port] of a meshtasticd TCP node to surface in list_devices (default port 4403).

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_MCP_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for recorder JSONL logs and persistent data. Defaults to platformdirs user-data-dir, then cwd. Set this to keep recorder data in a known location.

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_UI_CAMERA_DEVICE
environmentVariables.description: Camera device index or path for capture_screen (default: 0). Role-specific overrides: MESHTASTIC_UI_CAMERA_DEVICE_TESTER, _DUT, etc.

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_UHUBCTL_LOCATION_TESTER
environmentVariables.description: uhubctl USB hub location for the TESTER role port (e.g. '1-1'). Enables uhubctl_power/uhubctl_cycle against that role. Suffix varies by role: _DUT, _RELAY, etc.

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_PIO_BIN
environmentVariables.description: Path to the PlatformIO CLI binary. Searched in order: this env var, ~/.platformio/penv/bin/pio, then PATH. Only needed if PlatformIO is not on PATH.

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_ANDROID_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Meshtastic-Android source checkout (directory containing gradlew). Optional — enables building the APK from source via scripts/build_android_apk.sh. If unset, scripts default to cloning fresh or using a release APK.

environmentVariables.name: MESHTASTIC_APPLE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Meshtastic-Apple source checkout (directory containing Meshtastic.xcworkspace). Optional — enables building the iOS Simulator .app from source via scripts/build_apple.sh. If unset, scripts clone fresh.
